claim: A random-initialized recurrent student can learn verified observation/action/value/stop traces and deploy as the root action policy without loading or calling a foundation model.
training_invariants: generation zero is initialized only from the declared random seed
no pretrained tensors, adapters, embedding models, or tokenizer models are loaded
generation N greater than zero loads the complete model and optimizer state from exactly one student parent checkpoint
teacher cognition is reduced to verified observation/action/value/stop supervision before training
the trained checkpoint emits action, value, and stop outputs directly
receipt_requirements: parent checkpoint file digest when resumed
held-out value and stop calibration errors before and after training
falsification: held-out action accuracy does not improve beyond seed-matched random baselines
value or stop calibration degrades materially
the policy succeeds only by routing difficult actions to another model
quantized deployment loses the learned policy
admission_requires: frozen held-out improvement across at least three seeds
